metrics.multiple_testing: Holm adjustment across primary and neutral-band sensitivity category-share tests.

caveats: Group labels describe review language, not reviewer nationality.
Fukui Google review rows are nested in POIs; row-level p-values are descriptive without a clustered model.
English-language and Japanese-language review counts may be imbalanced.
Outputs are aggregate-only and omit row-level text, author fields, URLs, source IDs, review IDs, place IDs, and POI IDs.
VADER and oseti scores are different scales; H1 tests category shares only.
Sensitivity rows widen the neutral band and should be interpreted as robustness checks.
